_comment: Ground-truth baselines pinned from the LIVE Supabase DB (xscvfzfeepiakudshtod) on 2026-07-10. The gate asserts the dev's build reproduces THESE, not the prose in the spec. Re-pin only from a real query, never by hand.

posting_log.note: All 26 rows are reconstructed seed (source = 'reconstructed from Content Library (date approx)', account = null). The 15-Jun burst of 23 posts is HISTORICAL seed and legitimately exceeds the cap — the cap/cooldown invariants apply ONLY to app-written rows, never to this seed.

dna.note: New this sprint. Table does NOT exist yet on the live DB. Absence = the DNA section is unbuilt (AC6 HOLD/FAIL), present + rows = built.
